---
title: "Peter Kapec, PhD"
subtitle: |
  Assistant Professor <br>
  Faculty of Informatics and Information Technologies <br>
  Slovak University of Technology in Bratislava
description-meta: "Peter Kapec, PhD - Assistant Professor at FIIT STU"
image: "files/images/profile_pic.png"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: building
      text: FIIT STU
      href: https://www.fiit.stuba.sk/
      target: _blank
    - icon: door-open
      text: Office 4.30
      href: contact.qmd
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "#"
      id: email-copy-btn
    - text: Orcid
      href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3333-3568"
    - text: ResearchGate
      href: "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Peter-Kapec"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

My research focuses on **software visualization**, **interactive data visualization**, **visual data mining**, and **graph layout algorithms**. I am particularly interested in 3D visualization techniques, augmented reality applications, and innovative approaches to understanding complex software systems.

## Research Interests

- **Software Visualization** in 3D space
- **Graph Layout & Visualization Algorithms**
- **Interactive Data Visualization** & Visual Data Mining
- **Augmented Reality** Applications
- **Software Evolution** & Metrics Visualization
- **Documentation Generation** from Source Code

## Current Position

**Assistant Professor** | Institute of Applied Informatics
Faculty of Informatics and Information Technologies (FIIT)
Slovak University of Technology in Bratislava

**Office:** Room 4.30, Ilkovičova 2, 842 16 Bratislava 4
**Office Hours:** Wednesday 13:00-14:00
**Email:** peter.kapec@stuba.sk

## Education

**PhD** | Slovak University of Technology in Bratislava - FIIT <br>
**Ing** | Slovak University of Technology in Bratislava - FIIT <br>
**Bc** | Slovak University of Technology in Bratislava - FEI <br>
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  setTimeout(function() {
    let emailLink = null;

    //Method 1: by ID
    emailLink = document.getElementById('email-copy-btn');

    //Method 2: in about links
    if (!emailLink) {
      const aboutLinks = document.querySelector('.about-links');
      if (aboutLinks) {
        const allLinks = aboutLinks.querySelectorAll('a');
        allLinks.forEach((link) => {
          if (link.textContent.includes('Email')) {
            emailLink = link;
          }
        });
      }
    }

    //Method 3: all links
    if (!emailLink) {
      const allPageLinks = document.querySelectorAll('a');
      allPageLinks.forEach(link => {
        if (link.textContent.includes('Email') && (link.href.includes('#') || link.href === '')) {
          emailLink = link;
        }
      });
    }

    //add click handler if found
    if (emailLink) {
      emailLink.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();

        //copy email to clipboard
        navigator.clipboard.writeText('peter.kapec@stuba.sk')
          .then(function() {
            //save original content (icon + text)
            const originalHTML = emailLink.innerHTML;

            //change to "Copied!"
            emailLink.innerHTML = 'Copied!';
            emailLink.classList.add('copied');

            //restore original content after 2 secs
            setTimeout(function() {
              emailLink.innerHTML = originalHTML;
              emailLink.classList.remove('copied');
            }, 2000);
          })
          .catch(function(err) {
            console.error('Clipboard error:', err);
          });
      });
    }
  }, 500);
});
</script>
